Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and SW-Checklist Completed across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Checklist Completed to occur after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time until SW-Checklist Completed is performed following Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Checklist Completed in cases where Plagiarism Originality Report Completed precedes it
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Checklist Completed and the subsequent activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Checklist Completed to be done after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in variants that include both activities
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-AE Assign Reviewers in complex reviewer selection variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Time of SW-Checklist Completed relative to the start of the case (Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-Checklist Completed after the system confirms manuscript submission
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in end-to-end accepted manuscript variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Checklist Completed to occur after Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in variants containing co-author creation events
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Elapsed time from SW-Checklist Completed to the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'
